scripts.build: node scripts/fix-edge-patch-script-templates.mjs && node scripts/patch-stable-edge-masks.mjs && node scripts/patch-edge-candidate-hulls.mjs && node scripts/patch-ui-regressions.mjs && node scripts/patch-start-surface-flow.mjs && node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs=>{let p='scripts/patch-edge-canvas-candidates.mjs',s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');s=s.replace('a >= 35 && b >= 105 && g >= 80 && r <= 95 && b > r + 35 && g > r + 20','a >= 45 && b >= 125 && g >= 95 && r <= 85 && b > r + 55 && g > r + 30').replace('const radius = 3;','const radius = 5;').replace('if (cells < 18) continue;','if (cells < 12) continue;').replace('projectionZone.width * 0.035 || box.height < projectionZone.height * 0.050','projectionZone.width * 0.025 || box.height < projectionZone.height * 0.035').replaceAll('Reading visible edge layer with flood fill...','Reading strongest visible edge outlines...');fs.writeFileSync(p,s)})" && node scripts/patch-edge-canvas-candidates.mjs && tsc && vite build
